title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 19 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 19 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 19 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/05/2025
Today, the DCE Iron Ore futures continued to operate in the doldrums, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 722.5, down 0.89% for the day.Traders' enthusiasm for selling was moderate; steel mills adopted a cautious wait-and-see attitude and purchased as needed. The market transaction atmosphere was average. In the Shandong region, the mainstream transaction prices of PB fines were around 760-765 yuan/mt, down 0-5 yuan/mt from last Friday.
